This cavern is off limits to normal folk: This cavern is off limits to normal folk. Only those permitted by the Princess of Kristiline may be granted access.

Well... Considering I have never left Kr: Well... Considering I have never left Kristiline...
I suppose this is my entire world.
I used to come here as a child. With my: I used to come here as a child. With my entire family.
My sister, my father, and my mother. All: My sister, my father, and my mother. All together.
One day my mother got up and said she ne: One day my mother got up and said she needed to return to the\c[6] temple beneath the sea.
And with that she disappeared. I haven't: And with that she disappeared. I haven't seen her since.
We never came here after that, and our f: We never came here after that, and our family became unhappy.
...She's nothing but a traitor too. Just: ...She's nothing but a traitor too. Just like mother.
Now it's just me and my father, alone in: Now it's just me and my father, alone in Kristiline.
Life has never been the same.
ODESSA: I suppose that would be for the: ODESSA: I suppose that would be for the best.
It is said that the source of all life c: It is said that the source of all life comes from the water.
And that us Kristilians return to the se: And that us Kristilians return to the sea, instead of the dirt.
We are no less human than everyone else.
From dust we are born, and to dust we sh: From dust we are born, and to dust we shall return.
That's what my mother told me before she: That's what my mother told me before she left us.
But I don't think that was meant to be a: But I don't think that was meant to be a bad thing.
To be human, that is. To be just like ev: To be human, that is. To be just like everyone else.
AMBER: Of course there's nothing wrong w: AMBER: Of course there's nothing wrong with being just like everyone else.
ODESSA: That's the thing... My family is: ODESSA: That's the thing... My family isn't like everyone else.
For generations, we were given the task: For generations, we were given the task of protecting the Prince of the Sea.

But she abandoned me with father, all fo: But she abandoned me with father, all for some boy.
I was never supposed to be a princess. T: I was never supposed to be a princess. This wasn't my life.
When my mother left, life was hard. When: When my mother left, life was hard. When my sister left, life was hell.
ODESSA: And when I thought life couldn't: ODESSA: And when I thought life couldn't get worse, Angie took over.
Everything was my fault, somehow. Kristi: Everything was my fault, somehow. Kristiline fell because of me, somehow.
All these expectations, all these people: All these expectations, all these people yelling at me?!
So I said to myself. I'll do whatever it: So I said to myself. I'll do whatever it takes! Whatever it takes to escape this shithole!
ODESSA: ...I'm going to be really honest: ODESSA: ...I'm going to be really honest with you two.
I don't... I don't want to go back.
If I go back now I'm going to be thrown: If I go back now I'm going to be thrown back in that horrible dungeon once again.

I don't want to be a prisoner anymore. N: I don't want to be a prisoner anymore. No one to talk to. No friends...

AMBER: Ahah? Are you kidding? What was a: AMBER: Ahah? Are you kidding? What was all that ruckus then?
You are way stronger than you think, Ode: You are way stronger than you think, Odessa.
You had a shitty life situation, and you: You had a shitty life situation, and you made the move to get out of it.
Not really the right move, but a move ne: Not really the right move, but a move nevertheless.
You have to stand up to your father and: You have to stand up to your father and make him know that you're in charge of your OWN life.
Amber, \\PN, I'm too afraid to do it alo: Amber, \PN, I'm too afraid to do it alone!
I'm too weak to do something like this a: I'm too weak to do something like this alone!

So let \\PN and me help your dumbass out: So let \PN and me help your dumbass out. Okay?!
I'm... I'm so sorry for everything. I'm: I'm... I'm so sorry for everything. I'm so, so, sorry.
When you accompanied me on that walk, I: When you accompanied me on that walk, I really did appreciate what you were doing for me.

The fact that you were independent enoug: The fact that you were independent enough to make your own choices-- Explore your own world...

I went far and beyond, and I'm sorry.
